title: SQLancer distinct aggregate with error on group by constant
poc: SELECT MIN(DISTINCT t0.c1) FROM t0 WHERE 1 >= t0.c0 GROUP BY true;
key_bug_features: DISTINCT aggregate with GROUP BY constant
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "test_table"("id" SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, "value" DECIMAL(10,2), "group_id" INT);
SELECT MIN(DISTINCT "value") FROM "test_table" WHERE "group_id" = 1 GROUP BY true;
